description:
Operating Area: Croatia

At 52 meters, Alfa Mario is one of the largest Croatian yachts of its type. This 16-cabin stunner can accommodate up to 32 people, hosted by 12 crew.

M/Y Alfa Mario is the pride and joy of the Ercegovič family, shipbuilders with a long tradition and a numerous fleet under their belt.
The sundeck stands out with vast white lounging areas, a jacuzzi, outdoor gym, sauna and a huge shower, as well as the outdoor bar and BBQ.

She is ideal for large groups or families. Her clean lines, modern design, and amenities of a five-star hotel will leave you speechless.

crew.name: Dražen Ercegović
crew.bio:
Dražen has been a captain since 2006, amassing extensive experience in maritime operations. He owns the yacht Alfa Mario, a vessel named in honor of his father. Hailing from a family deeply rooted in shipbuilding, Dražen is part of a lineage with a longstanding tradition in the industry. His family oversees a fleet of yachts, manages a hotel, and operates a shipyard, further contributing to their prominent presence in the maritime domain. During his downtime, Dražen enjoys going for a swim and rowing. In 2020, he swam across the Brač channel between the island of Brač and his hometown, Krilo, taking him 3 hours and 20 minutes.

Languages Spoken:
English, Croatian

crew.name: Nina Kuzmanović
crew.bio:
Nina has been a dedicated professional in the wellness and hospitality industry since 2020. With a background in physiotherapy, she quickly advanced in her career to managerial levels during her tenure on luxury cruise ships like the "Queen Elizabeth" and "Arvia". She acquired extensive experience in delivering high-standard services, ensuring exceptional guest satisfaction, and managing operations efficiently. In her free time, Nina enjoys staying active, reading, and listening to podcasts about mental and physical well-being. Fluent in Serbian and English, she brings a positive work ethic and extensive experience to ensure a serene and rejuvenating experience for all guests.

Languages Spoken:
English, Serbian

crew.name: Dragan Lakić
crew.bio:
Chef Dragan has 20 years of experience in top hotels and restaurants, as well as aboard M/Y Aurelia before joining Alfa Mario. His culinary expertise extends across Mediterranean, Greek, French, Italian, and Mexican cuisines. Coupled with his proficiency in catering to various dietary needs and allergies, every guest is guaranteed to depart the dining table thoroughly satisfied When on the sea, as a big fan of fishing, there is always fresh fish on his menu. He loves to present his creations, and his greatest pleasure is to see the happy and satisfied faces of his guests.

Languages Spoken:
English, Swedish, Serbian

crew.name: Miloš Kiković
crew.bio:
Chef Milos is a talented chef from Serbia who brings a wealth of culinary expertise from his experiences in esteemed restaurants and hotels across Belgrade, Serbia, and Budva, Montenegro. His culinary journey has led him into yachting, and following a remarkable year as the head chef aboard the superyacht Ohana, he joined Alfa Mario in 2024 to deliver exceptional dining experiences tailored to discerning guests, showcasing his passion for gastronomy and dedication to excellence.

Languages Spoken:
English, Serbian

crew.name: Jean Frkić
crew.bio:
Jean is a highly experienced Chief Officer with over 20 years of maritime experience, including extensive work on charter yachts. He has a strong background in navigational watch, piracy watches, cargo operations, and safety equipment maintenance. Jean has demonstrated professionalism and calm under pressure, gaining praise from previous employers for his reliable and effective leadership. He holds all relevant certifications, including the Master of a Ship up to 500 GT and Yacht Master category B. Jean is dedicated, detail-oriented, and passionate about his work, making him a valuable asset to any yacht crew. 

Languages Spoken:
English, Italian, Spanish

crew.name: Leonardo Luksetić
crew.bio:
After finishing maritime school, Leonardo immediately started in this industry, gaining various experiences—such as working on the ships Kapetan Kuka, Providenca... and eventually joining the yacht Alfa Mario, where he is currently in his third season. In his free time, Leonardo enjoys spending time in nature and good company, either staying active or relaxing with a good book or movie.

Languages Spoken:
English, Italian, Spanish

crew.name: Antonio Zemunik
crew.bio:
Antonio comes from a family with a long maritime tradition. At just 21 years old, he has five seasons of experience on yachts along the entire Adriatic coast. After finishing high school, he completed his professional training on an expedition cruiser in Antarctica, where he refined his skills in navigation through thick ice and extreme conditions. He is currently preparing for the Lieutenant's exam, a crucial step toward achieving his dream of becoming a deep-sea captain one day. When not on board, Antonio spends his time studying for further education and is an avid sports enthusiast who loves snowboarding. During the winter, he often travels to France and Austria in search of adrenaline. 

Languages Spoken:
English, German, Spanish, Croatian

crew.name: Marin Lesandrić
crew.bio:
With three years of experience working on yachts and a decade in the hospitality industry, Marin brings a wealth of knowledge and dedication to our team. He has also completed a sommelier course, enhancing his ability to provide exceptional service. Outside of work, Marin enjoys outdoor activities like hiking and spending time in nature in general. He is also passionate about giving back to the community, volunteering in his free time to assist the elderly and those in need. 

Languages Spoken:
English, German, Czech, Croatian

crew.name: Karla Čaljkušić
crew.bio:
Karla brings valuable experience from her work as a waitress at the prestigious Le Meridien Hotel, a top 5-star establishment, where she worked for several years before boarding Alfa Mario. In her free time, Karla is a dedicated ballet dancer, performing and competing at various events. Alongside her passion for dance, she is also pursuing a degree in Business and Economics at the University of Split, demonstrating her commitment to both her professional and personal growth.

Languages Spoken:
English, German, Croatian

crew.name: Mateo Čopo
crew.bio:
With four years of experience working on various yachts, including two years on Alfa Mario, Mateo is a seasoned professional in the maritime industry. Although he completed his studies at the Maritime Faculty, his passion for bartending led him to pursue a career in this field. In his free time, Mateo manages his own business with speedboats, combining his entrepreneurial spirit with his love for the sea.

Languages Spoken:
English, German, Croatian

crew.name: Ivana Vukas
crew.bio:
Ivana has spent the past four years working on various ships, first joining "Alfa Mario" in 2021 and returning in 2024. With several seasons of experience, she has found her place on board, thriving in the dynamic and versatile environment that yachting demands. Her love for the sea and the beauty of her homeland keeps her passion for this career alive. Ivana holds certifications as both a bartender and a sommelier, adding to her versatility on board. She is currently completing her studies at the Faculty of Law. In her free time, Ivana trains in kickboxing, enjoys hiking, swimming, and exploring new cultures through travel.

Languages Spoken:
English, Croatian

pricingInfo.name: SEASON A (From 31 May 2026 till 15 June 2026) & SEASON C (From 04 September 2026 till 27 September 2026)
